## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm run gate:neutrality` and `npm run gate:deps` pass
- [ ] No vendor or company names in core source or public docs
- [ ] Wire/protocol changes come with tests and a PROTOCOL.md update
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed
